extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: I counted only the against rows. Criminal proceedings against all listed entities total 2 against the Company + 7 against Directors + 5 against Promoters + 0 against the Subsidiary + 3 against KMP + 0 against SMP = 17, excluding all By rows, including the 86 matters filed by the Company and the 11 Section 138 complaints. Statutory/regulatory proceedings against the listed entities total 1 + 1 + 1 + 0 + 1 + 0 = 4, while tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiary total 18 + 12 = 30; tax was kept separate from regulatory actions. The aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiary is taken from their against-row amounts, ₹42.97 million + ₹2.55 million = ₹45.52 million, converted to ₹4.552 crore; promoter/director amounts and all By-row amounts are excluded. No contingent-liabilities total, going-concern statement, or statutory auditor report status is disclosed in the provided risk section. The company-wide customer concentration uses the most recent full fiscal year, FY2025, and is stated as a percentage of revenue from operations: top five clients 74.59% and top ten clients 86.14%. The litigation source tables use ₹ million; conversion is ₹45.52 million ÷ 10 = ₹4.552 crore.
